tasks.title: Revised AOP — send to Shashwat & Shivika Goenka
tasks.desc: Target EBITDA neutral FY'27 (was –₹2.5Cr). Email is the deliverable this week.
steps: Rework financial model to reach EBITDA neutral for FY'27
Validate key assumptions with finance team
Draft cover email and send to Shashwat & Shivika Goenka

tasks.title: Month-end P&L — lock FY close number
tasks.desc: Range ₹8.4–8.8Cr loss. HARD CONSTRAINT: B2B must land at +₹5L or better — negative B2B is not acceptable.
steps: Pull latest actuals — revenue, COGS, opex by channel
Isolate B2B P&L — confirm at +₹5L minimum
Align team on forecast vs commitment; escalate gaps immediately

tasks.title: AR collections — detailed review before FY close
tasks.desc: Working capital = AR + Inventory – AP. AR too high. Drive collections before 31 Mar.
steps: Pull full AR ageing report by client and amount
Flag top 5 overdue accounts; initiate follow-up calls this week
Separate disputed items from clean receivables
Set working capital target with finance; track daily till FY close

tasks.title: Nature's Basket recon — close all inter-company accounts
tasks.desc: Inventory both ways (TGS↔NB), purchases, opex/rental payables to NB, commission receivables to TGS. Finance has action steps.
steps: Get finance action steps list; assign owners and deadlines
Reconcile inventory movements both ways (TGS↔NB)
Net off commission receivables vs opex/rental payables
Get NB sign-off on final settlement figure

tasks.title: Spencer's Retail recon — same structure as NB
tasks.desc: Same commission model as NB. Inventory, purchases, commissions, opex/rentals. Full closure before FY end.
steps: Apply same recon framework as NB to Spencer's accounts
Reconcile inventory, purchases, commissions and opex with SRL
Identify and resolve disputed line items
Get SRL sign-off and close accounts before 31 Mar

tasks.title: Negative inventory analysis — hand off to supply chain
tasks.desc: System showing negative SKUs. Identify, map to positive inventory, deliver clean numbers to supply chain.
steps: Extract full negative inventory report by SKU and location
Map each negative SKU to its corresponding positive inventory entry
Package analysis and hand off to supply chain with recommendations

tasks.title: Year-end tax planning — discuss with CA and make payments
tasks.desc: Comprehensive year-end review with CA. Total liability, advance tax, payments due before 31 Mar.
steps: Schedule call/meeting with CA before 31 Mar
Review total tax liability for FY25-26
Make any outstanding advance tax payments before deadline

tasks.title: Submit GST invoices Jan–Mar 2026 to RPSG Ventures
tasks.desc: Monthly retainer exclusive of GST. Raise 3 months of pending invoices. Base and GST paid separately. Currently overdue.
steps: Raise GST invoices for Jan, Feb, Mar 2026
Submit to RPSG Ventures finance team
Confirm base amount and GST paid separately per contract

tasks.title: TDS correction — RPSG Ventures filed incorrect TDS
tasks.desc: Higher income shown than received, inflating personal tax return. RPSG must file correction before return is filed.
steps: Get exact TDS mismatch figures from CA
Escalate to RPSG Ventures finance to file TDS correction
Confirm correction reflected in 26AS before filing return

tasks.title: AOP FY'27 — schedule formal review meeting with promoters
tasks.desc: After AOP email acknowledged, schedule formal meeting with Shashwat & Shivika Goenka. Dependent on Task 1.
steps: Confirm AOP email has been sent and acknowledged
Reach out to schedule formal review meeting

tasks.title: Nirvan's PAN card, bank account & mutual fund setup
tasks.desc: Get PAN for Nirvan (2yr old). Open minor bank account, set up direct MF account, start investing accumulated gift money.
steps: Apply for PAN card for Nirvan (minor PAN with guardian details)
Open bank account in Nirvan's name (minor account)
Set up direct mutual fund account linked to his bank account
Start SIP or lump sum investment of accumulated gift money
